failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: pB8REH
- Undocumented Content-Type
Received: text/event-stream; charset=utf-8 Documented: application/json
[200] OK:
`data: {"type": "thinking", "message": "Checking if I already know this...", "stage": "precheck", "progress": 10, "status": "working", "waiting": false, "timestamp": "2026-04-13T18:12:39.834787Z"}\n\ndata: {"type": "thinking", "message": "Understanding your question...", "stage": "analysis", "progress": 25, "status": "working", "waiting": false, "timestamp": "2026-04-13T18:12:39.834911Z"}\n\ndata: {"type": "complete", "answer": "Here are 3 concise key bullet points:\n\n\u2022 Nearby clinics offer walk-in ser // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-agent-lx27.onrender.com/ask/stream?question=Can+you+summarize+this+in+3+key+points%3F&query=Where+is+the+nearest+food+bank%3F&thread_id=default&lang=en&provider=ollama&model=llama3.1%3A8b&clarification_response=I+meant+housing+resources+in+ZIP+94110.&context_answer=Nearby+clinics+include+Eastside+Community+Health+Center+%28walk-ins+welcome%29+and+Northside+Family+Medicine.&tags=housing%2Cpermits&tag_match_mode=any&include_untagged_fallback=True&rerank=False&rerank_top_k=5'

`data: {"type": "thinking", "message": "Checking if I already know this...", "stage": "precheck", "progress": 10, "status": "working", "waiting": false, "timestamp": "2026-04-13T18:12:45.302636Z"}\n\ndata: {"type": "thinking", "message": "Understanding your question...", "stage": "analysis", "progress": 25, "status": "working", "waiting": false, "timestamp": "2026-04-13T18:12:45.302756Z"}\n\ndata: {"type": "complete", "answer": "Here are 3 concise key bullet points:\n\n\u2022 Nearby clinics offer walk-in ser // Output truncated...`
